title: lantana geminata
intro: Lantana geminata, also known as shrub verbena, is a shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Lantana geminata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
